topic: Two friends both apply for the same job
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya bounced on the balls of her feet, a bright, almost vibrating energy radiating off her like heat from asphalt. She smoothed down her already impeccable blazer for the tenth time, a wide, uncontainable smile stretching across her face. "This is it, Leo! I *have* to nail this interview. I feel like I could conquer the world right now!" She practically skipped into the lobby of Sterling & Co., her eyes sparkling with an almost manic delight as she spotted the receptionist. Internally, she was a whirlwind of buzzing anticipation; every potential outcome felt like a dazzling possibility. She practically vibrated with readiness, certain that her enthusiasm would be the key to unlocking the position.

[story 2]

Mark leaned back in his chair, a genuine, unrestrained grin splitting his face. He tapped his pen against his notepad with rapid, excited clicks, his whole posture radiating kinetic energy. "Oh, this is fantastic! I'm so ready to dive in," he murmured to himself, his voice carrying a high, bright pitch. He paced the small waiting area, his movements quick and light, his gaze darting around the office, cataloging every opportunity. A thrill shot through him—a pure, unadulterated rush of excitement. He felt like a spring wound impossibly tight, ready to launch into whatever came next.

[story 3]

"Yes! Absolutely, I'm the perfect fit!" Chloe practically sang the words, her hands clasped so tightly her knuckles were white. She couldn't stop fidgeting; her leg bounced rhythmically beneath the table, and she kept catching her reflection in the darkened window, beaming. A fierce, almost giddy energy propelled her forward. "I can't wait to start! This is everything I've been aiming for!" she declared, her voice bubbling over with sheer joy. Every nerve ending felt alive, humming with the sheer pleasure of the prospect, making her want to leap right off the chair and celebrate.
